title: 30 Pcs Light Blue Paper Plates 9 Inch Disposable Scalloped Party Paper Plates Baby Blue Dessert Plate for Birthday Baby Shower Wedding
features: Light Blue Paper Plates Set: Package includes 30 x 9 inch light blue plates, enough quanities for using in multi-person gatherings
Cute Scalloped Edges Design: The edges of baby blue plates are designed with scalloped pattern, which highlights cute and elegance of plates, which can set off the party atmosphere
Blue Party Plates Material: Blue dessert plates are made of thick paper,and surface is coated to be waterproof and oil-proof.Do not put in microwave

Wide Application: Light blue paper plates are suitable for various parties, such as birthday, boy baby showers, bridal showers, weddings, graduation ceremonies and other parties. They can also be used for daily family dinners and picnics
Saving Cleaning Time: Blue party plates can be thrown away directly after use, not cleanup required, you can have more time to enjoy the party with friends or families
